timeline.description: GOAL! A dream start for Milan. Pirlo delivers a free-kick and Maldini volleys it in from 10 yards out in the first minute!
Milan dominates the midfield. Pirlo is free to control possession, and Kaká's movement between lines is causing massive issues.
Injury forced change: Kewell OUT, Šmicer IN. Tactical adjustment remains similar but changes team chemistry.
Shevchenko scores but is ruled offside. Liverpool is struggling to cope with Milan's counter-attacks.
GOAL! A deadly counter. Kaká drives forward, plays it to Shevchenko, who squares it for Hernán Crespo to tap in!
GOAL! A masterclass from Kaká. He plays a sensational, curving through-ball from his own half, and Crespo chips it over Dudek!
Halftime. AC Milan leads 3-0. Tactical analysis shows Liverpool's 4-4-1-1 is being shredded by Kaká running behind Gerrard and Alonso.
Liverpool Halftime Change: Finnan OUT, Hamann IN. Benítez shifts to a 3-5-2 (3-4-2-1) formation, placing Hamann to mark Kaká.
With Hamann protecting the back three, Alonso and Gerrard are freed to push forward. Kaká is effectively neutralized.
GOAL! Riise's cross finds Steven Gerrard, who loops a brilliant header past Dida. The captain rallies the fans!
GOAL! The comeback is on! Šmicer shoots from 25 yards out, Dida is late to react, and it flies into the bottom corner!
GOAL! Drama! Gattuso fouls Gerrard in the box - Penalty! Xabi Alonso's penalty is saved by Dida, but Alonso reacts quickest to smash the rebound into the roof!
Milan responds. Ancelotti replaces Seedorf with Serginho, shifting tactics. Milan regains control, attacking Liverpool's right flank.
Carragher makes a heroic sliding tackle to deny Kaká. Liverpool is defending deep in a low block, exhausted.
Regular time ends 3-3. Milan pushes hard in the final minutes. Epic tactical battle: Benítez's defensive structure vs Ancelotti's wing play.
Extra time halftime. Carragher is suffering from severe cramps but continues to intercept Milan's crosses. Milan dominates.
Double save of the century! Dudek saves Shevchenko's header, then somehow deflections Shevchenko's point-blank rebound over the crossbar!
Match ends 3-3. Penalty shootout decides the champion. Dudek performs his famous 'wobbly legs' routine.

refereeRulings.explanation: Gattuso fouled Steven Gerrard inside the penalty box. Gerrard drove into the box and was tripped from behind by Gattuso's trailing leg. A penalty was correctly awarded, and Gattuso received a yellow card.
Shevchenko put the ball in the net, but the assistant referee correctly raised the flag for offside. Kaká had played the pass when Shevchenko was half a yard beyond the last defender, Carragher.
